meaning: n.<美>人造丝,人造纤维,人造丝织物,人造纤维织物
examples: The Salyan Rayon is located near wetlands frequented by migratory birds.
Six of the cases occurred in Salyan Rayon in the south-eastern part of the country.

With its cranberry-colored rayon lining and enormous shoulder pads, it had been used as a clown costume.
